interview_trace.question: Can you describe a time when you implemented a change to an existing recruitment process, and what impact it had on the hiring outcome?
Can you give me a specific example of an end-to-end recruitment process you've managed in the past, and what challenges you faced during that process?
How would you design the data storage and retrieval mechanism for candidate profiles and application history in your end-to-end recruitment process?
Can you walk me through your thought process behind designing a system to handle candidate communication and notification throughout the recruitment process?
